articles.title: EXCLUSIVE: CBP Officers Seize $4 Million in Cocaine at San Diego Port
articles.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) officers at the San Ysidro Port of Entry recently found and seized more than 225 pounds of cocaine in a single smuggling event. The late-April seizure demonstrates the agency’s ability to focus on defeating cartel smuggling networks that continue to probe the heightened Trump border security posture for weaknesses. The post EXCLUSIVE: CBP Officers Seize $4 Million in Cocaine at San Diego Port appeared first on Breitbart .
